enabled.name: Add Dice Borders
enabled.hint: Adds Dice borders to the render at a bit of performance cost

show-above-ui.name: Show Above UI
show-above-ui.hint: Show this modules dice and numbers above the UI

show-ghost-rolls.name: Show 'Ghost' Rolls
show-ghost-rolls.hint: Show dice rolling for rolls that the user can't see but don't show them the result

size.name: Dice Size
size.hint: Set the size of the dice (1 = 100%)

roll-duration.name: Roll Duration
roll-duration.hint: How long should the dice roll for in seconds

display-duration.name: Display Duration
display-duration.hint: How long should the result be show in seconds
